exploration_notes: All four key Activity lifecycle files were found in the local repo. (1) `Activity.java` (line 763) defines `public class Activity extends ContextThemeWrapper` with lifecycle callbacks `onCreate` (line 1818), `onStart` (line 2105), `onResume` (line 2183), `onPause` (line 2613), `onStop` (line 2842), and `onDestroy` (line 2886).
